English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Ithaca Area United Jewish Community records
Ithaca Area United Jewish Community.
6876
3 cubic feet. 3 cubic feet.
1900s. Correspondence, Photographs, Printed Material, Publications The collection includes correspondence, meeting minutes, annual reports, newsletters and other printed matter, publications, photographs, and architectural plans reflecting the activities of the organization.. Collection material in English 6828703
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
September 2011
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, September 2011
Date modified:
RMC Staff, September 2011
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
The collection includes correspondence, meeting minutes, annual reports, newsletters and other printed matter, publications, photographs, and architectural plans reflecting the activities of the organization. Includes official Board business; Treasurers' Reports, Board meeting minutes, fund raising campaigns, public relations and advertising, financial allocations, the United Jewish Appeal, the Ithaca Jewish Welfare Fund and the Committee for the Resettlement of Jewish Refuges in Ithaca.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the permission of the Chair or other officers of the Board.
Restrictions on Use:
Information that personally identifies an individual by name and/or address cannot be published in either print or electronic form.
Cite As:
Ithaca Area United Jewish Community records, #6876. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Jewish communities -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
